Therefore, option (D) is incorrect because it says Hell's Kitchen is a few blocks east of Broadway when in fact it's west. So (D) is the false statement. But earlier I thought (A) was incorrect. Let me recheck (A). The text says his father told him to stop "this craziness and get a job" when he was in Hollywood driving a cab and working as a waiter.
